title: lithocardium parviflorum
intro: Lithocardium parviflorum, also known as Small-flowered Lithospermum, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. Lithocardium parviflorum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to be used in traditional medicine.
